items.title: Save up to 35% on Waterdrop Filter systems this Mother’s Day with our exclusive promo code – up to $312 in savings
items.summary:
With Mother’s Day right around the corner, if you’re thinking about a practical home upgrade this year – something that adds everyday convenience alongside the usual flowers and chocolates – a reverse osmosis system can be a useful addition to the kitchen. It also happens to be a great time to save hundreds of dollars on a Waterdrop Filter reverse osmosis system with the brand’s Mother’s Day deals, along with additional savings available through our exclusive code. These deals will be live from April 30 through May 10, so you get a solid window to take advantage of the offers. Whether you’re considering the popular G3P800 tankless RO system, one of the brand’s widely used under-sink models, or the newer M6H countertop unit, there’s a Waterdrop Filter option available to suit a wide range of needs and budgets. Head below for a closer look at the current lineup and their discounted Mother’s Day pricing.

items.title: Lenovo’s Legion Go S is one of our favorite Windows gaming handhelds, now down to its lowest price at $150 off
items.summary:
As part of its wider Best of Tech sale event, Woot is offering Lenovo’s 2025 Legion Go S Windows gaming handheld for $599.99 Prime shipped today (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). You can grab this deal via the Woot app to save an additional $20 off, dropping it down to $579.99 Prime shipped. This Glacier White Windows version originally launched with a $730 price tag and has remained one of the more sought-after Legion Go variants, especially as stock has become increasingly limited following the launch of the Legion Go 2. Unlike the SteamOS version, which has seen a few discounts in recent months, the Windows model has largely stayed at full price until now. Today’s deal knocks as much as $150 off, marking the lowest price we’ve tracked so far, while also standing out as one of the few listings that actually has the handheld in stock right now. Head below for more details.

items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Mother’s Day Sale, EcoFlow has launched a 48-hour flash sale with up to 59% savings on three units – two being solar bundles and one being a portable electric cooler bundle. Among the two solar packages, things start with the DELTA 3 Max Portable Power Station with a 220W solar panel down at $999 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing over at Amazon. While you may see it tagged with a $2,148 MSRP, it hasn’t really climbed higher than $1,249 in 2026, with discounts usually keeping the costs lower between $1,099 and $1,049, though there have been periods where things dipped to $999, which is beaten out only by the $949 low we last saw during Black Friday. For two days, you can take advantage of this $250 markdown off the going rate (and $1,149 off the MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked behind Black Friday pricing. Head below to check out the full lineup of flash deals while they last.

items.title: Review: Beatbot’s Sora 70 is a more accessible, but still thorough, 5-in-1 pool cleaning robot solution
items.summary:
Robot pool cleaners are becoming more and more common in pools across America, providing autonomous support for their upkeep while giving back time to owners to enjoy the water – plus, they keep that water swim-ready with regular scheduling. What’s more, swimming season is upon us, with many folks starting the process of opening them now that we’re getting more and more consistent warm weather. Some of the most advanced of these pool cleaning robots on the market come from Beatbot, with premium models like the AquaSense Ultra starting up in the $3,000 range, though the brand recently released its Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner to provide more accessible pricing with top-tier features. Of course, I picked one up to help my parents maintain their pool, both of them now in their elderly years, while also dealing with some physical disabilities. Head below to get a full rundown on mine and their experiences in this hands-on review.

more…

items.title: Score your Star Fox Switch 2 pre-order at $10 off (Amazon ‘Pre-order Price Guarantee’)
items.summary:
Nintendo just announced an official price hike coming to Switch 2, that’s not good. Nintendo also just official unveiled the new StarFox game and pre-orders are already seeing a deal at Amazon and Walmart. This is good. The physical copy of the new N64 remake is actually carrying a $60 MSRP, and you can already secure a copy down at $49.99 courtesy of Walmart or Amazon:

  • Star Fox Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $60) | Amazon
  • Star Fox Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $60) | Walmart

This effectively just the same price as the digital copy’s $50 MSRP, but if you want a boxed edition this is likely going to be the best price we see ahead of launch in late June (the Amazon price guarantee will ensure you pay the lowest price it drops to between now and then anyway). 

Head below for the rest of this week’s best Switch and Switch 2 game deals. 

Surprise Star Fox Nintendo Direct starts now! Officially releases this summer [Updated]
